items.title: Add personal-data categories to CCPA pre-decision notice
items.description: Expand the on-form ADMT notice to enumerate the categories of personal information used (credit bureau, income self-report, employment, internal account history). Wire the §1704(3) bridge so the same notice satisfies both regimes.

items.title: Document IL biometric/no-biometric posture for collections selector
items.description: The early-stage collections selector references 'voice channel preference' — confirm with vendor whether any biometric voice data is retained. If yes, implement BIPA consent flow; if no, document the negative finding in the Vendor Vault.

items.title: Renew independent bias-audit attestation (Workday Skills-Match)
items.description: Engage BABL AI (or equivalent independent auditor) to re-attest. Publish summary on candidate-facing audit page within 10 business days.

items.title: Commission first independent bias audit for iCIMS Video-Interview Sentiment
items.description: AEDT was deployed in Q1 without a published bias audit. LL144 violation accruing per-candidate. Pause use for NYC roles until audit is posted.

items.title: Implement IL BIPA consent flow for video-screen tool
items.description: Capture written informed consent for biometric data collection before video begins. Update retention schedule to 3 years or until purpose is fulfilled, whichever is shorter.

items.title: Add ADMT pre-use notice to Workday-driven CA postings
items.description: Job postings published via the Workday integration are missing the CCPA ADMT pre-use element. Update the post template; back-fill notice to current applicant pool.

items.title: Augment post-decision disclosure with right-to-correction language
items.description: CO §1705 right-to-correction language missing from the candidate update template. One-line addition; no workflow changes needed.

items.title: Implement BIPA written-consent flow for in-cabin driver monitoring
items.description: Capture written informed consent at first vehicle pairing for Aria EV head-unit driver-monitoring camera. Post public BIPA retention schedule. Pause any non-real-time retention of facial-landmark data for IL-registered vehicles until consent is captured.

items.title: Block telematics features in captive-finance pipeline absent secondary-use opt-in
items.description: Surfaced in BUY-CA-7733 reconsideration: Pinetop MAC v11.4 used telematics signals from prior connected vehicles as financing inputs, but the CV activation flow never captured a secondary-use opt-in for financing. Patch the feature pipeline to require opt-in attestation before joining telematics signals to the financing feature vector. v11.4.1 vendor patch is in flight.

items.title: Add CCPA-CDA 'right to limit' element to connected-vehicle activation flow
items.description: Connected-vehicle activation flow discloses ADMT use but does not surface the right to limit use of sensitive personal information (precise geolocation). Add the element to the activation flow; back-fill notice to current connected-vehicle customer base.

items.title: Augment captive-finance post-adverse-outcome notice with right-to-correction line
items.description: Captive-finance §1704(3) notice template missing the right-to-correction line. One-line addition.

items.title: Publish CPPA risk assessments for high-risk ADMT
items.description: CPPA risk-assessment regulation requires documented risk assessments for high-risk ADMT (captive finance, driver monitoring, behavioral segmentation). Three assessments outstanding; templates pre-populated from Instrata classification basis cards.
